news.Title: 台積電下一個秘密武器曝光！CoWoS之後 張曉強點名「COUPE」
news.Content:
過去幾年，台積電先進封裝CoWoS隨AI熱潮快速竄紅，也帶動相關供應鏈成為市場焦點。不過，台積電業務開發及全球業務的資深副總經理暨副共同營運長張曉強今（14）日在2026年技術論壇台灣場次上指出，隨著進入AI與高速通訊時代，產業下一個需要記住的關鍵字，將會是「COUPE」，也就是緊湊型通用光子引擎（Compact Universal Optical Photonic Engine）。

台積電今日在新竹舉辦年度技術論壇。張曉強表示，過去業界原本預估，全球半導體營收要到2030年才會達到1兆美元規模，但在AI需求強力推動下，今年半導體營收就將遠超過這項里程碑，等於提前達成長期產業目標。

他指出，過去10年半導體主要成長動能來自智慧型手機，未來10年則毫無疑問將由AI接棒。

針對技術創新的下一個關鍵，張曉強表示，如果說過去幾年市場熟悉的是CoWoS，那麼接下來AI時代的新名詞就是COUPE。COUPE技術的核心在於將光子傳輸與電子運算進行高效整合，這將是台積電推動AI系統性能持續增長的秘密武器，也是未來幾年半導體產業最重要的技術名詞之一。

台積電說明，COUPE將整合共同封装光學（CPO）解決方案，與傳統銅線相比，基板上搭載COUPH的CPO可提供4倍的功耗效率且延遥減少90%，藉由在中介層上使用COUPE技術，效能可進一步提升，實現10倍的功耗效率與延遲減少95%。

台積電也同步公布最新研發進展，搭載COUPE技術的全球首個200Gbps微環調變器（MRM），預計將於2026年進入量產。公司表示，在製程控制優勢下，該技術可實現低於1E-08的位元誤差率。後續台積電也將持續朝400Gbps調變器、多波長技術與多列光纖陣列單元推進，目標是在2030年達到4Tbps/mm的頻寬密度。

除了技術布局，今年論壇另一項受到關注的焦點，是兩位新任副總袁立本與田博仁也擔任講者，展現台積電新一代管理與技術人才陸續浮上檯面。

袁立本於2011年加入台積電，目前擔任業務開發組織副總經理，負責整合公司業務策略、技術藍圖，並與客戶及生態系合作夥伴溝通。在升任副總前，他曾任先進技術業務開發資深處長，負責先進邏輯技術、高效能運算、封裝與射頻技術組合。

袁立本也曾在設計暨技術平台組織歷練，參與7奈米、5奈米技術的設計技術協同優化，以及在5奈米之後的下一世代邏輯技術路徑探尋（pathfinding）。

在加入台積電之前，袁立本曾任美國新思科技（Synopsys）簽核分析產品事業部總監。他在全球擁有32項專利，其中包含22項美國專利。袁立本畢業於台灣大學電機工程學系，並於美國伊利諾大學厄巴納－香檳分校取得電機與電腦工程碩士及博士學位。

田博仁目前擔任營運組織先進技術工程副總經理，並於2022年1月升任晶圓十二B廠資深廠長。他自1998年加入台積電後，長期投入晶圓廠營運與先進製程技術的落地量產。

田博仁負責管理晶圓十二B廠，成功量產台積自28奈米到領先全球的2奈米等先進邏輯製程技術，貢獻涵蓋產品效能、良率、可靠度、生產力、成本控制與供應鏈管理等面向。

news.Title: The Profit Margins for These 3 AI Infrastructure Stocks Are Off the Charts
news.Content: The artificial intelligence boom sometimes gets a bad rap for fueling pure speculation in companies with weak underlying businesses. But there are plenty of companies making significant profits now due to surging AI-related demand. Three connected to that space that boast enviable profit margins today are Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) , Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) , and Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) . These companies are experiencing booms in their businesses thanks to high demand ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU), Sandisk (SNDK), and Broadcom (AVGO) are experiencing high profit margins due to surging AI-related demand.
• These companies supply essential components like memory, storage, and AI processors for AI data centers, benefiting from tight supply.
• Sandisk reported a 78.4% gross profit margin, Broadcom 74.4%, and Micron Technology 74.4% in their most recent quarters.
• This high margin is attributed to increased AI spending by hyperscalers and a supply-demand imbalance, with Alphabet planning up to $190 billion in AI infrastructure spending.
• While margins are currently exceptional, they may normalize as production capacity increases and market dynamics shift, though demand is expected to remain elevated.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, profit margins, supply chain, demand surge, semiconductor

news.Title: 世新大學躲過私校倒閉潮 專家曝20年前投資神操作
news.Content:
台積電本月初衝上2345元歷史天價，今年迄今股價已上漲近44%，財信傳媒董事長謝金河在臉書發文分享，他過去曾建議世新大學的董事買進台積電，如今多年過去，台積電股價上漲為該校帶來豐沛的財源。

謝金河表示，他曾經在世新開了一個學期的課，那個時候跟時任董事長成嘉玲熟識，2000年前後她詢問學校校務基金的錢怎麼投資，聽了建議後買進台積電，現在世新持有的台積電成為校務基金理財之母，帶來豐沛的財源，在眾多私校退場中財務卻相當從容。

謝金河說，世新現任董事長周成虎近日也特別請他吃晚餐，周是洛杉磯La Verne大學公共行政博士，這次校務投資幾乎All in所有AI相關股。他看好世新有周董事長坐鎮，理財可以高枕無憂。

謝金河提到，他過去也曾建議達新董事買台積電，2020年2月，達新把台中市大遠百旁的惠國段土地2593坪以83.75億元賣給興富發，達新的董事胡柏墩請教賣地變現的錢怎麼用，聽了建議全部換成台積電，除了股價增值，也可以用台積電的股息收入拿來配息給股東。

謝金河說，達新把賣土地的錢換成台積電股票變成活水，保住流動性，而且，股價增值可以帶給公司更大的利益，包含達新董事胡柏墩及柳萬成都聽進他的話，大力買進台積電股票，那時候台積電股價在235.5元左右，只不過達新逢高賣出，現在剩下不多。

news.Title: 川習會爆「稀土換ASML機台」？華爾街示警：若交換成真 台韓3巨頭危險
news.Content:
AI浪潮推升全球晶片股狂飆之際，市場擔憂「川習會」恐成為半導體行情的關鍵變數。專家警告，若美中達成「稀土換ASML設備」的協議，隨著中國大陸擴產壓低晶片價格，包括台積電、三星、SK 海力士等大廠定價權可能遭受衝擊，恐難保獲利優勢。

《巴隆周刊》（Barron's）報導，美國總統川普與大陸國家主席習近平於14、15 日在北京舉行高峰會。資深研究機構 Gavekal Research執行長蓋夫（Louis-Vincent Gave）分析，美中雙方目前存在強烈的互補需求，美國急需補充稀土庫存，而中國大陸則渴望打破美方封鎖，取得艾司摩爾（ASML）的先進曝光機。

他警告，若美中未來真的出現「稀土換ASML曝光機」的協議，恐改變全球半導體產業格局，甚至進一步壓低晶片價格。一旦中國取得更多先進製程能力，進而壓低全球晶片價格，對台積電、三星電子及SK海力士等主要晶片廠的定價能力也將面臨嚴峻挑戰。

除了政治角力，中東局勢的惡化也為半導體需求蒙上陰影。蓋夫指出，伊朗戰爭不僅推升能源風險，更可能直接衝擊中東地區大型資料中心的投資進度，進而壓抑AI基礎建設的需求成長。此外，若油價與通膨壓力持續攀升，也可能讓全球央行更難啟動降息，進一步壓抑科技股估值。

蓋夫表示，近期晶片股表現強勁，主要受惠AI需求持續爆發，以及企業第一季財報優於市場預期。費半指數上周更創下自2000年網際網路泡沫以來最大25日漲幅，其中，英特爾、美光強勢飆漲，更成為背後重要推手。

對於AI概念股是否已經漲過頭，蓋夫並未完全轉趨悲觀。他認為，只要半導體企業持續上修獲利預估，加上市場對中東局勢降溫尚存期待，晶片股仍有機會延續漲勢。

news.Title: AI演進「實體化」！台積電揭秘1.5兆美元大布局
news.Content:
人工智慧正從生成式、代理式演進至實體AI，台積電預計半導體市場今年即將超越1兆美元門檻，並於2030年達到1.5兆美元 。台積電以A14、A16等先進製程與CoWoS技術，驅動HPC與AI領域的智慧革命 。

半導體邁向兆元里程碑

台積電表示，智慧革命正揭開序幕，人工智慧（AI）正從生成式AI（Generative AI）和代理式AI（Agentic AI）演進至實體AI（Physical AI） 。這場變革由先進半導體技術的功耗與效率驅動，原先預測2030年達標的1兆美元半導體市場，現在預計在今年就會提前超越門檻，並於2030年達到1.5兆美元 。其中，高效能運算（HPC）及AI領域佔整體市場的55%，是成長的主要動力 。

先進邏輯技術邁向埃米世代

在製程技術方面，台積電展示了清晰的技術發展藍圖。N2製程已於2025年第四季開始量產，而N2P與搭載超級電軌（Super Power Rail）的A16則計畫於2026年下半年分別進入量產與生產就緒階段 。針對A14技術的延伸，台積電推出可直接微縮的A13製程，相較於A14能節省6%的面積，並透過設計與技術協同優化（DTCO）提供額外的功耗與效能優勢，預計於2029年進入生產 。

▼台積電提供

CoWoS技術扮演關鍵角色

針對AI訓練及推論需求，台積電的CoWoS技術扮演關鍵角色。2026年將生產全球最大的5.5倍光罩尺寸CoWoS，良率超過98% 。更先進的系統級晶圓（TSMC-SoW）技術能整合邏輯與HBM晶粒，使中介層尺寸放大超過40倍光罩尺寸，預計2029年推出更先進的SoW-X技術 。此外，具備3D互連的SoIC技術提供比2.5D更強的連接密度，A14對A14的堆疊計畫於2029年實現量產 。

（封面圖/台積電官網）

news.Title: 《韓股》KOSPI收漲1.75%、連2日創新高
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-14 16:40:33 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(14)日呈現高檔震盪走勢。韓國KOSPI指數終場收在7981.41點，上漲137.40點或1.75%，創下收盤歷史新高，盤中最高觸及7991.04點，逼近8000點；韓國KOSDAQ指數則收在1191.09點，上漲14.16點或1.20%。盤勢呈現高檔震盪格局，市場情緒受到美中領導人會談與聯準會人事相關消息影響，形成風險性資產定價的再評估背景。

權值股方面，Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)表現強勢、上漲4.23%；SK Hynix(000660.KS)小幅下跌0.30%；LG Energy Solution(373220.KS)上漲2.79%；HD Hyundai Heavy Industries(329180.KS)則大幅下跌8.46%。類股方面，食品飲料、保險、消費與醫療精密等防禦性及消費類股輪動上漲；相較下，部分造船與重工股因題材或風險因素表現疲弱。

資金動向方面，外資今日大幅賣超，成為指數在漲勢中趨震盪的顯著壓力；與此同時，散戶與機構的買盤在短期內支撐了指數，形成內資撐盤、外資撤出的格局。

連二紅 台幣早盤升值4.4分

news.Title: 台積電新武器來了！ 搭載COUPE技術微環調變器 今年進入量產
news.Content:
台積電於2026年技術論壇宣布，半導體市場今年將提前跨越1兆美元大關 。透過首款200Gbps微環調變器（MRM）量產與MRAM、RRAM技術革新，台積電正以領先的矽光子及記憶體布局，驅動從生成式AI邁向實體AI的智慧革命 。

矽光子COUPE技術領銜量產

台積電在高效能運算（HPC）與AI領域持續突破，特別是針對傳輸效能與功耗的關鍵痛點，推出了緊湊型通用光子引擎（COUPE）技術 。台積電表示，搭載COUPE技術的全球首個200Gbps微環調變器（MRM）將於2026年正式進入量產 。這項技術能將共同封裝光學（CPO）解決方案整合，相較於傳統銅線，基板上的COUPE可提供4倍的功耗效率，並減少高達90%的延遲 。若在中介層上使用該技術，效能更可進階提升至10倍功耗效率與95%的延遲縮減 。台積電更預告，未來將持續擴展至400Gbps調變器與多波長技術，目標在2030年實現每毫米4Tbps的頻寬密度 。

非揮發性記憶體轉向MRAM與RRAM

針對特殊製程技術，台積電宣布非揮發性記憶體正加速朝向MRAM（磁阻隨機存取記憶體）與RRAM（電阻式隨機存取記憶體）發展，以支援製程從40/28/22奈米持續縮小至16/12奈米 。目前，40/28/22奈米的RRAM已自2022年起量產，而更先進的12奈米RRAM也已準備好進行客戶設計定案（tape-outs） 。在磁性記憶體方面，22奈米MRAM已穩定生產，16奈米版本則進入設計定案階段 。台積電強調，目前正開發能進一步提升邏輯密度與效能的12奈米MRAM，預計於2026年底前就緒 。

車用與射頻技術的先進布局

台積電在論壇中亦揭示了先進汽車技術的進程，N3A製程已於2025年第四季完成汽車應用認證，目前已有超過10個新設計定案 。此外，專為自動駕駛與實體AI設計的N2P「Auto-Use」製程設計套件也已啟動，而基於奈米片技術的N2A則預計在2028年首季取得認證 。在射頻技術領域，最新的N4CRF技術相較於前代，能為智慧型手機及AI眼鏡等RF SoC產品降低39%的功耗並縮減33%的面積 ，展現出台積電在多元應用領域的全面領先。

（封面圖/東森新聞）

news.Title: 〈台積技術論壇〉擴產火力全開 全球18座晶圓廠同步建設
news.Content:
台積電 (2330-TW)(TSM-US) 今 (14) 日舉辦技術論壇，營運組織先進技術工程副總經理田博仁表示，為滿足全球客戶快速成長需求，台積電正以過去兩倍速度推進全球產能擴張，現階段正在全球新建與改造 18 座晶圓廠，其中包括 5 座先進封測廠，將同步強化先進製程晶圓產能與先進封裝產能。

田博仁指出，台積電 2017 年至 2024 年平均每年新建 4 座新廠，但 2025 年至 2026 年間，擴張速度將提升至每年 9 座新廠，顯示公司正加速回應 AI、高效能運算 (HPC) 與先進封裝需求快速成長。2026 年，台積電計畫在台灣新建 4 座晶圓廠與 2 座先進封裝廠，並持續推進全球 12 吋晶圓廠布局。

美國第二座廠 2027 年下半年生產 N3 製程

在海外布局方面，美國亞利桑那州廠區已完成現有廠區與新土地取得，以支援後續擴張計畫。田副總表示，亞利桑那第一座晶圓廠已於 2024 年底開始生產 N4 製程，預計 2026 年產出將年增 1.8 倍；第二座晶圓廠預計 2026 年下半年開始設備移入，並於 2027 年下半年開始生產 N3 製程；第三座晶圓廠已在 2025 年上半年動工，第四座晶圓廠與第一座先進封裝廠也已進入初期建設階段。

日本 28/22 奈米良率已達台灣水準

日本熊本方面，第一座晶圓廠已進入 28 奈米與 22 奈米量產；第二座晶圓廠已於 2025 年開始建設，預計生產 N3 製程。田博仁表示，熊本廠 2026 年 N28 與 N22 產出目標，將達 2025 年的 2.3 倍，且 28 奈米、22 奈米良率已達與台灣廠相當水準。

歐洲布局部分，德國德勒斯登 ESMC 建設進度順利，該廠將聚焦汽車與工業應用，支援歐洲客戶採用 28 奈米、22 奈米、16 奈米與 12 奈米製程技術。中國大陸廠區則將持續提供 16 奈米與 28 奈米產品。

台灣是擴產核心

台灣仍是台積電先進製程與先進封裝擴產核心。田博仁指出，目前台灣共有 12 座晶圓廠或先進封裝廠正在建設中，其中新竹 20 廠與高雄 22 廠是 N2 及更先進製程量產基地，兩座晶圓廠已開始量產；台中 25 廠則已於 2025 年動工，計畫 2028 年開始量產，預計生產 2 奈米及更先進製程。

N2 首年產出比 N3 多 45%

先進製程方面，田博仁表示，台積電最先進 N2 製程已進入量產，良率學習曲線優於 N3 同期進度，後續以 N2 為基礎、搭配 A16 製程，也將按計畫如期量產。為支援客戶對 2 奈米製程的強勁需求，台積電在研發與營運團隊「One Team」協作下，將於 2026 年同步啟動多座晶圓廠，N2 量產第一年產出將較 N3 同期高出 45%，2026 年至 2028 年 N2 產能預計將以約 70% 的年複合成長率擴大。

N3/N5 產能至 2027 年 CAGR 達 25%

除 N2 外，台積電也將持續擴大 N3 與 N5 產能。田博仁指出，儘管 N3 與 N5 製程技術複雜度高於 N7，但量產初期表現已優於 N7；2022 年至 2027 年，N3 與 N5 產能將以約 25% 的年複合成長率擴充，並透過不同製程節點間的彈性配置，提高產能調度效率。

2027 年前先進封裝產能 CAGR 逾 80%

在先進封裝方面，田博仁表示，CoWoS 與 SoIC 等 3DIC 技術持續推進，SoIC-X 已進入量產階段，相關產能預期將有超過 80% 的成長。為滿足 AI 應用對先進封裝的強勁需求，台積電 2022 年至 2027 年將以超過 80% 的年複合成長

news.Title: Will Nvidia Beat Q1 Earnings on May 20? Here's What Prediction Markets Think.
news.Content: With Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) scheduled to report its fiscal 2027 first-quarter results on May 20, prediction markets are already humming. On Polymarket, the implied probability that Nvidia will beat expectations sits around 90%. Clearly, the crowd is leaning bullish. But does that mean smart investors should follow prediction markets blindly into earnings season ? What is Wall Street expecting for Nvidia's Q1 earnings? Among ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) is scheduled to report Q1 fiscal 2027 earnings on May 20, with prediction markets indicating a ~90% probability of beating expectations.
• Wall Street consensus estimates revenue of $78.8 billion and EPS of $1.77 for Q1.
• Goldman Sachs forecasts revenue to beat consensus by $2 billion and raises Q2 estimates.
• The article cautions against relying solely on prediction markets, emphasizing the importance of supply chain analysis and institutional insights.
• Strong AI infrastructure spending by hyperscalers (Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft) and accelerating demand in the memory ecosystem support Nvidia's long-term demand narrative.
news.Keywords: earnings forecast, prediction markets, AI spending, hyperscalers, supply chain analysis

news.Title: 台股漲377點 三大法人買超175億 被動元件「6檔」噴漲停
news.Content:
台股今（14）日開高走低，終場以41751點作收，上漲377點，漲幅0.91%，成交量來到1.21兆。三大法人合計買超175.27億，其中投信買超142.48億，外資結束連4日賣超，今日小買45.43億。

觀察今日籌碼動向，外資及陸資買超45.43億，投信買超142.48億，自營商賣超12.63億，合計買超175.27億。

權值股方面，台積電開高震盪收2270元，漲50元，漲幅2.25%，鴻海收244.5元，下跌2.59%，聯發科受證交所列入處置股影響，股價來到3405元，跌幅2.58%。

今日被動元件、記憶體族群走勢強勁，被動元件類股中，國巨*、華新科、禾伸堂、光頡、鈺邦、天二科技共6檔漲停，凱美、興勤也有逾5%的漲幅；記憶體類股中，華邦電、群聯漲停，南亞科漲幅逾6%，力積電漲幅逾3%。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 《台股盤後》收漲377點、42K未攻克，惟收復5日線
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-14 16:02:54 新聞中心 發佈

美股週三費半指數漲逾2.5%、盤後CISCO季報利多再激勵NASDAQ電子盤走勢，台股今(14)日由台積電領軍，搭配電子權值股智邦、聯電鎖漲停，以及國巨*等被動元件、南亞科等記億體族群強攻下，雖然19大類股與十大權值股皆跌多漲少、日股午盤後翻黑壓抑大盤漲勢，加權指數終場仍收在41751.75點、42K得而復失，上漲377.25點或0.91%，仍順利收復5日線，成交量1兆2167.78億元。

AI晶片、太空、光通訊概念股飆高，抵銷通膨數據比預期火熱、聯準會(Fed)將在可預見的未來維持限制性貨幣政策的疑慮，那斯達克指數、標準普爾500指數雙雙登上歷史收盤新高。亞洲股市方面，日經225指數早盤在半導體相關股揚升下呈現上漲，不過之後漲勢不繼、收跌0.98%；韓國KOSPI指數則收漲1.75%。

今日電子股收漲1.2%、為19大類股表現最亮眼族群，主要係台積電挾輝達CEO最後一刻列入美方赴中代表團，且市場對台積今日技術論壇也抱有釋出利多的期待，相對尾盤亦見急拉效應，終場收在最高點2270元、上漲2.25%，而智邦挾CISCO美股盤後季報利多強攻漲停、聯電亦強勢鎖漲停，不過致茂重挫6%，創意、鴻海、聯發科、廣達同步收黑。惟在資金輪動下，被動元件族群獲點火，國巨*、華新科、禾伸堂、光頡、天二科技、鈺邦齊攻漲停；搭配三星大罷工在即，市場預期記憶體供需失衡狀況恐加劇下，華邦電、群聯鎖漲停，南亞科漲6%、宜鼎/創見漲逾5%。

而橡膠漲1.1%、鋼鐵漲0.6%則居19大類股漲幅第二與第三，主要係正新Q1財報優預期、大成鋼4月營收創高的激勵效應；相對台塑四寶走勢仍不振、帶動塑膠股跌1.7%、玻陶股亦因台玻續挫1.6%帶動該類股下跌1.5%，加上汽車股下跌1.1%，係今日19大類股表現最差的三大族群。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人合計買超175.27億元；其中，自營商賣超12.63億元，投信買超142.48億元，外資及陸資買超45.43億元。

news.Title: 台積電狠甩英特爾、三星　最大尺寸CoWoS量產良率98%
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年05月14日電）近來英特爾、三星技術提升搶單消息不斷，台積電今天在台灣技術論壇上不僅宣布推出3項先進製程，包括A13、A12及N2U，今年也將量產全球最大尺寸的CoWoS，良率高於98%，全面展現技術領先決心，並將快速擴充先進製程與先進封裝產能，支持客戶強勁需求，用技術領先輾壓對手。

台積電台灣技術論壇今天在新竹喜來登大飯店登場，台積電全球業務資深副總經理暨副共同營運長張曉強表示，過去10年半導體成長動能主要來自手機，預期未來動能將來自人工智慧（AI），預期2030年全球半導體產值可望達到1.5兆美元規模，其中AI及高效能運算將貢獻最大，比重達55%；亞太業務處長萬睿洋則說，台積電去年亞太地區客戶使用超過210萬片12吋約當晶圓，垂直堆疊高度約1600公尺，超過3座台北101大樓。

英特爾（Intel）與三星（Samsung）近日傳出在晶圓代工和先進封裝接單上獲得突破性進展，恐打破台積電先進技術獨步全球局面，這也讓今天台灣登場的技術論壇格外引人矚目，市場高度關注台積電先進製程與先進封裝技術進展和產能擴充情況。

台積電業務開發副總經理袁立本表示，台積電持續推出領先業界技術，並強化現有平台，支持客戶需求，今年推出3項先進製程，包括A13、A12及N2U。

他指出，A13製程是A14製程的增強版，會讓台積電在埃米世代持續技術領先，預計2029年量產。A12製程則會把背面供電技術導入A14製程平台，實現更好效能、功耗與面積效益，同樣將於2029年量產。

袁立本表示，台積電2奈米製程於去年第4季量產，並持續進展，包括N2P、N2X 以及最新推出的N2U，N2P將於今年下半年量產，N2X預計2028年量產。N2U是基於N2P技術進一步優化，提供更好的能效與速度，將於2028年量產。

袁立本說，台積電已收到約25個2奈米產品設計定案，另有超過70個客戶設計正在規劃或進行中。AI、高效能運算（HPC）與手機應用加速採用2奈米，2奈米第2年的設計定案數量約為5奈米同期的4倍。

至於先進封裝方面，袁立本表示，台積電今年將量產全球最大的5.5倍光罩尺寸 CoWoS，且良率高於98%。未來5年CoWoS 將持續每年放大尺寸發展，整合更多邏輯與高頻寬記憶體（HBM）晶粒。

袁立本指出，台積電預計2028年開始生產整合20個HBM的14倍光罩尺寸CoWoS，可整合24個HBM、大於14倍光罩尺寸的CoWoS版本預計2029年就緒。

台積電營運副總經理田博仁說，台積電2奈米已進入量產，學習曲線優於3奈米，將逐步進入大家的生活中。A16如期於2026年下半年量產。

為支持客戶不斷增長的創新需求，田博仁表示，台積電以過去2倍的速度加速晶圓廠擴建，並在全球建立新廠房。此外，在新產能開出前，台積電持續利用數位化轉型以及AI驅動的技術，提高先進製程產出，支持客戶緊急需求。

田博仁指出，台積電2026年同時啟動5座晶圓廠，快速提升2奈米產能，估計第1年2奈米晶圓產出將較同期3奈米產出高出45%，2026年到2028年2奈米產能年複合成長率將達70%。

此外，台積電3及5奈米產能於2022到2027年複合成長率也將達25%，支持客戶強勁需求。田博仁說，台積電克服地理限制，將3奈米、5奈米及7奈米廠區串聯成Super Giga Fab，利用AI實現跨廠區最佳化，最大幅度提高生產力。

田博仁表示，台積電CoWoS和SoIC產能自2022年至2027年複合成長率將超過80%。

news.Title: 永豐期貨：川習會無法激勵台股，期現不同調
news.Content:
【財訊快報／編輯部】指數週四上漲377.25點，收在41751.75點，成交量1.26兆元。台指期上漲188點至41636點，逆價差為-115.75點。籌碼面部分，三大法人買超175.27億元；而在台指期淨部位方面，三大法人淨空單減少460口至-7330口，其中外資淨空單減少1692口至-51068口；十大交易人中的特定法人全月份台指期淨空單減少47口至-2908口。川習會成為今天全球市場唯一主軸，資金明顯提前押注美中關係短線降溫，帶動亞洲科技股與半導體族群走強，但市場真正交易的並不是「中美和解」，而是「衝突不要再升級」。從目前外媒釋出的訊號來看，雙方談判重點集中在關稅、稀土與AI晶片限制，美國希望穩住供應鏈與通膨，中國則希望爭取出口與科技喘息空間，因此這次比較像經濟層面的停火談判，而不是政治立場轉變。另一方面，市場現在也開始出現另一種聲音，就是若美中關係真的從對抗轉向有限合作，台灣原本享有的地緣政治溢價可能被重新定價，尤其半導體戰略價值若不再像過去兩年那麼極端，外資對台股的估值邏輯也可能改變，值得注意的是，美國現在其實比市場想像更需要這場會談，因為高利率壓力、通膨與債務問題都讓白宮沒有太多空間再全面升高對中衝突，尤其川普如果要贏的期中選舉，他更需要先穩住金融市場與企業界。

選擇權未平倉量部分，05月買權最大OI落在48300點，賣權最大OI落在35000點；週買權最大OI落在查無資料點，賣權最大OI落在查無資料點。全月份未平倉量put/call ratio值由1.69下降至1.62。VIX指數上升1.12至39.33。外資台指期買權淨金額1.1億元；賣權淨金額1.17億元。

news.Title: 聯電推14奈米eHV FinFET 搶OLED驅動IC商機
news.Content:
聯電 (2303-TW)(UMC-US) 今 (14) 日宣布推出用於顯示驅動 IC 的 14 奈米嵌入式高壓 (eHV) FinFET 技術平台，並可提供製程設計套件(Process Design Kit, PDK) 供客戶進行設計導入。此全新製程已於聯電 12A 廠完成驗證，可提升電源效率與效能，同時縮小晶片尺寸，助力新一代顯示技術的發展。

相較於聯電目前量產中最先進的 22 奈米製程 eHV 解決方案，14 奈米 eHV FinFET 平台可降低 40% 的功耗與縮小 35% 的晶片面積，進一步延長電池續航力，並支援更小型、輕薄的驅動模組設計，以提供高階與摺疊式 OLED 智慧型手機顯示應用。

在數位電路方面，14 奈米平台以 FinFET 元件取代平面電晶體，並透過最佳化的 I/O 元件設計與更高的驅動速度，進一步提升電氣效能，確保訊號完整性，同時支援高解析度顯示應用所需的高刷新率。此外，優化後的中電壓元件具備更小的線寬間距並支援更廣泛的電壓操作範圍，為驅動電路設計提供更高的彈性。

聯電技術研發副總經理徐世杰表示，顯示應用無所不在，市場需求將持續朝向更高畫質、更快速度與更低功耗發展。聯電此次 14 奈米 eHV 平台的推出，是公司首次將 FinFET 技術導入顯示驅動領域，具有重要里程碑意義。隨著客戶產品功能不斷升級，聯電將持續以領先的製程技術，協助客戶將創新構想化為可量產的成果。

聯電長期在 OLED 顯示驅動 IC 市場中居於領先地位，目前亦為業界唯一提供最先進 22 奈米顯示驅動 IC 解決方案的晶圓代工廠。憑藉著領先的 eHV 製程技術、完整的 IP 資源與強大的設計支援能力，聯電以涵蓋 0.6 微米至 14 奈米的高壓製程技術平台，為顯示產業提供最完整的解決方案，攜手客戶共同引領顯示新世代。

news.Title: 【Follow法人】外資轉買卻狂倒貨群創友達逾22萬張 鴻海也遭砍逾2萬張
news.Content:
（下午5點分更新買賣超個股）

台股今（14）日盤中漲幅一度漲逾800點，終場上漲377點，以41,751點作收。三大法人今日由賣轉買，今日買超175.27億元，其中外資終止連4賣，今日轉買超45.42億元。對此，資深台股分析師江慶財表示，今日川習會互動釋出相對正面的訊號，讓原先市場擔憂的風險暫時降溫，也使外資對台股基本面的看法重新轉向正面。觀察今日籌碼動向，外資轉買卻狂倒貨面板雙虎群創（3481）、友達（2409），合計遭倒貨逾22萬張，鴻海（2317）也同步遭砍逾2萬張賣超。

外資今日賣超前三大：群創、00403A、友達

觀察今日賣超榜，由面板雙虎占前兩大，群創（3481）今外資再續砍逾20萬張居冠，慘淪賣超第一；其次則是主動統一升級50（00403A）拿下，遭外資砍逾9.2萬張，第三則是友達（2409），同步賣超逾2.4萬張。

值得注意的是，鴻海（2317）今日下午召開法說會，遭外資賣超逾2.1萬張，和碩（4938）也同步賣超逾1.7萬張，以及衛星（2377）賣超逾1.5萬張。

外資今日買超前三大：台新新光金、大成鋼、00981A

今日買超方面以金融股台新新光金（2887）拿下，獲外資掃貨逾5.2萬張，為今日外資買盤重心，大成鋼（2027）也同樣獲得逾3.4萬張買超，排第二；主動統一台股增長（00981A）則是同步獲外資青睞，逾3.3萬張買超，居第三。

其餘個股則包含二哥聯電（2303）獲外資掃貨逾2.4萬張，另外記憶體族群華邦電（2344）以及力積電（6770）也同步獲青睞，分別買超逾2.4萬張，以及1.6萬張。

外資回心轉意！分析師：市場不確定性降溫

江慶財表示，台股4月營收與獲利表現優於市場預期，也是外資回補的重要原因之一，尤其記憶體族群獲利表現超乎預期，進一步帶動市場信心。「公司最終還是要回歸基本面。」江慶材表示，只要沒有其他重大利空因素，台股後續仍有機會持續向上。

他也提到，近期MSCI同步調升台股在全球標準型、亞洲區以及中小型成分股等三大指數權重，這種情況相對少見，代表台股在全球市場的重要性持續提升。雖然權重調整並非立即生效，但外資通常會提前布局卡位，加上目前台股成交量放大，也讓外資態度轉趨積極，「之前擔心的事情都沒有發生，所以外資回頭來看，可能認為之前賣錯了。」

至於投信今日也持續買超142.47億元，已連17買。江慶財表示，因00403A上市初期，投信手上資金充足，通常第一天買超力道最大，後續則會逐步建立持股部位，金額也會慢慢趨緩。

三大法人轉買超175億元 外資終止連4賣

根據證交所公布籌碼動向，三大法人今日由賣轉買，合計買超為175.27億元，外資則終止連4賣，今日轉買超45.42億元。

投信則是延續買超，今日買超142.47億元，已連呈17買；自營商今日也延續賣超，單日合計賣超為12.62億元，其中自行買賣部分賣超9億元，避險方面賣超3.62億元。

台股今日開高走高，終場上漲377點，收在41,751點，成交金額達1.25兆元。台積電（2330）終場以2,270元作收，上漲50元。

湯暖萱／財經特派記者，主跑主計處、營建、百貨紡織等

news.Title: 聯發科衝高卻回檔 台股漲377點盤中又見4萬2
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]記者林浩宇,攝影謝隆証

台股520行情提前暖身！隨著川習會登場，市場樂觀情緒快速升溫，帶動今（14）日台股強勢反攻。在台積電、台達電等電子權值股同步走揚之下，記憶體、被動元件等族群也全面點火，加權指數盤中再度挑戰42000點整數大關。終場加權指數上漲377點，以41751點作收，成交量達1兆2585億元。

市場一邊屏息等待川習會會談結果，另一邊資金已經先衝了，美股科技股強勢表態，也讓台股14日展開一波慶祝行情，台積電重返5日線，台達電、日月光等主要權值股同步走揚，帶動加權指數盤中一度大漲超過800點，再度攻上42000點整數大關，只可惜市場持續觀望，川習會後續發展，火力略顯不夠，再度上演5日線保衛戰。

顧德投顧分析師 黃紫東：「按照過往的慣性來看，兩人的見面對台股的影響並不是那麼大，整體而言第一件事情，影響我們台灣的一些工具機，或者是一些封裝等等相關的產業，是不是畢竟在中國有設廠，整體而言台股的主流還是集中在記憶體、PCB族群，按照本身產業和技術上的突破，以及發展，這部分和川習會基本上聯動度就比較低。」

觀察盤面焦點，記憶體很給「利」，南亞科、群聯雙雙飆出新天價，多檔個股漲幅也超過半根停板；被動元件族群同步火力全開，國巨、華新科等攻上漲停，蜜望實則是漲停後打開；矽光子族群也點火，大立光亮燈漲停。

晶圓代工二哥聯電再亮紅燈；納入MSCI成分股的旺矽，更首度突破6000元，強勢攻上漲停；反觀森崴能源將在6月23日下市，股價直接殺到跌停，盤面上超過超過3萬多張賣單，排隊搶著逃命。

隨著520行情即將到來，市場也開始期待，歷史是否會再度重演？根據統計，台股在520前5個交易日，上漲機率高達6成，在520過後漲率跟漲幅更明顯的攀高，後10個交易日台股的上漲機率高達100%。

統一投顧資深分析師 陳立委：「其實今年是AI的元年，那在5月的題材是非常的多，那包括今天是台積電的技術論壇，台積電預計釋出一些半導體跟CPO的展望，那接下來19日是Google的I/O大會，20日除了總統的週年典禮之外，那時候可能會宣誓一些政策，或者是投資面的利多，這些也是會幫助股市上漲，也是NVIDIA輝達的財報公布日，那6月2日緊接著COMPUTEX電腦展。」

不只520行情備受期待，從2016年至今近十年來看，若在歷年5月底進場布局，平均一年、二年、三年報酬率，分別為12%、25.1%、35.9%，呈現階梯式的成長。

這也顯示5月底，正是布局台股的重要時間點，在多個題材帶動之下，市場也期待，這班多頭列車能再開往下一個高點。（記者林浩宇、謝隆証／台北報導）

news.Title: What to Expect From the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump became the first US leader in almost a decade to visit China when he landed in Beijing on Wednesday. His much-anticipated two-day summit with President Xi Jinping — delayed from March due to the Iran war — offers the leaders of the world’s two largest economies a chance to reset personal ties and look for common ground on trade, technology and a range of other contentious topics. Most Read from Bloomberg Iran’s Kharg Island Oil Jetties Empty Again Yesterday, Satellite Shows Ambani’s Cola War With Coke, Pepsi Spurs Fridge Bonanza in India Nvidia’s CEO Joins ...
news.AI_Summary:
• President Trump's visit to China for a summit with President Xi Jinping aims to reset relations and find common ground on trade and technology.
• Key agenda items include the Iran War, with the US expected to press China on its relationship with Iran.
• Import tariffs between the US and China remain a point of tension, though both leaders may seek to extend a détente.
• Cooperation on curbing illicit fentanyl trade is a potential area of alignment.
• The summit is also expected to address trade and purchasing commitments, with the US seeking large-scale commitments from China.
news.Keywords: US-China Summit, Trade Policy, Geopolitical Tensions, Iran War, Tariffs

news.Title: Exclusive-US clears H200 chip sales to 10 China firms as Nvidia CEO looks for breakthrough
news.Content: May 14 (Reuters) - The U.S. has cleared around 10 Chinese firms to buy Nvidia 's second-most powerful AI chip, the H200, but not a single delivery has been made so far, three people familiar with the matter said, leaving a major technology deal in limbo as CEO Jensen Huang seeks a breakthrough in China this week. More from Yahoo Scout What strategic concerns drive Beijing's hesitation on H200 purchases? Why haven't approved H200 chip sales materialized? How does Trump's revenue-sharing arrangement with China work? Which Chinese companies ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The US has cleared approximately 10 Chinese firms, including Alibaba, Tencent, and ByteDance, to purchase Nvidia's H200 AI chip.
• Despite US approval, no deliveries have been made, leaving a major technology deal in limbo.
• Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang joined President Trump's trip to China, hoping to unlock stalled sales of H200 chips.
• China's hesitation is driven by a strategic desire to focus on developing its domestic AI chip industry.
• Nvidia previously held about 95% of China's advanced chip market, but export controls are eroding its foothold.
news.Keywords: Export Controls, US-China Tech Rivalry, AI Chips, Market Access, Geopolitics

news.Title: China's view on Elon Musk? Visionary, occasional villain
news.Content: May 14 (Reuters) - In China, Elon Musk has been the object of love - and occasional loathing. The Tesla boss has been both lauded as a visionary and criticised by Chinese regulators and the public for the alleged bungling of customer complaints. In addition, the dominance of SpaceX and its Starlink satellite unit has raised the ire of the People's Liberation Army. ‌And as the gap between Tesla and its Chinese EV rivals narrows, Musk is at risk of losing prestige and influence. Musk is now among a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Elon Musk's presence in China with the US CEO delegation highlights his complex relationship with the country, viewed as both visionary and occasionally criticized.
• Musk aims to accomplish 'many good things' during his visit, aligning with Beijing's tech priorities in EVs, AI, and autonomous vehicles.
• Tesla sold approximately 626,000 cars in China last year, accounting for about a fifth of its revenue.
• Concerns exist regarding SpaceX's Starlink dominance and its implications for national security, prompting China to develop domestic alternatives.
• Musk is reportedly looking to buy $2.9 billion worth of solar panel manufacturing equipment from Chinese suppliers.
news.Keywords: EV Market, Autonomous Driving, AI, Geopolitics, Supply Chain

news.Title: Why I'd Rather Own Micron Stock Than Sandisk
news.Content: Memory chip stocks have been scorching hot in recent months, driven by a massive shortage amid AI demand. Two of the biggest winners have been Micron (NASDAQ: MU) and Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) . Micron is one of the three large, diversified memory companies, along with the Korean giants Samsung and SK Hynix , while Sandisk was spun off from Western Digital last year and specializes in NAND flash ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Both Micron (MU) and Sandisk (SNDK) have seen significant stock gains driven by AI demand and memory shortages.
• Sandisk has outperformed Micron with a 3,400% gain over the past year, specializing in NAND flash memory.
• Micron is considered a more diversified supplier with DRAM, NAND, and High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM), potentially making it less susceptible to memory cycle downturns.
• Micron's integrated device manufacturer (IDM) model with its own fabs, including a new $100 billion megafab, is seen as a long-term advantage, especially with US government support via the CHIPS Act.
news.Keywords: memory chips, AI demand, cyclicality, product diversification, integrated device manufacturer

news.Title: 全球新廠布局推進，台積電今年同步啟動五座晶圓廠，AI封裝產能暴增80%

news.Title: The Real Reason Microsoft Just Went All-In on AI Infrastructure. It's Not What You Might Think.
news.Content: When Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) announced it would spend $190 billion on capital expenditures (capex) in 2026, most people saw it as an arms-race headline. The race would involve chips, servers, and power cables; it would be a spending war with Amazon and Alphabet . Whoever builds the most wins. That framing misses the actual strategy. Buried inside Microsoft's fiscal second-quarter 2026 earnings was a number that tells a fuller story than the capital expenditure figure alone. The company's commercial ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft's $190 billion capex for 2026 is framed as a strategic AI infrastructure play, not just an arms race.
• Commercial remaining performance obligations surged 110% YoY to $625 billion, indicating strong contracted future revenue.
• Microsoft expects to remain capacity-constrained on GPUs, CPUs, and storage through at least 2026, with power being a key bottleneck.
• The company is investing heavily in physical infrastructure, including data centers and renewable energy, and shifting to an AI agent-based revenue model, with over 15 million paid Copilot seats generating $5.4 billion ARR.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, capital expenditures, contracted revenue, capacity constraints, renewable energy, AI agents

news.Title: 3 Reasons This Warren Buffett Favorite AI Stock Could Soar Over the Next 10 Years
news.Content: Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) stock has been hitting new all-time highs recently, capping a remarkable rebound from a 52-week low of about $193. The tech giant's market capitalization has climbed to about $4.4 trillion as of this writing, and shares are up more than 40% over the past 12 months. With the stock sitting around $300, some investors may wonder whether shares can climb any higher. But take a closer look at the iPhone maker's fundamentals, and the case for owning the stock for the long haul arguably still appears compelling. Revenue in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's stock has reached new highs, with market capitalization around $4.4 trillion and shares up over 40% in the past 12 months.
• Q2 fiscal 2026 revenue increased 17% YoY to $111.2 billion, with EPS of $2.01, up 22%.
• Services revenue hit a record $31 billion in Q2 fiscal 2026, up 16% YoY, driven by a growing installed base of over 2.5 billion active devices.
• Apple Intelligence is driving an iPhone upgrade cycle, with iPhone revenue up 22% YoY in Q2 fiscal 2026, supported by collaborations with Google and an enhanced Siri.
news.Keywords: revenue growth, services revenue, installed base, AI integration, iPhone upgrades

news.Title: CoWoS之後，台積電張曉強拋出新關鍵詞，「COUPE」或成半導體產業焦點
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】台積電(2330)業務開發及全球業務的資深副總經理暨副共同營運長張曉強今日在技術論壇中提到，台灣隨便路上都知道CoWoS，但未來大家還要記住另一個關鍵詞『COUPE』。張曉強指出，從Chip Ar ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電張曉強提出新關鍵詞「COUPE」（Co-Packaged Optical / Optical Photonic Engine），將是未來AI擴大規模的關鍵。
• AI加速器架構包含Advanced Compute SoC、HBM、Advanced Packaging（CoWoS），未來AI Inference將更依賴高頻寬DRAM與先進記憶體整合。
• 台積電正與DRAM廠商合作，將DRAM直接堆疊在Compute上，實現更進一步的3D Integration與Memory Stacking。
• AI架構可拆解為「Communication + Compute」、「Advanced System Integration」及「Optical / Photonics」三層，其中光子技術是未來最大變化。
news.Keywords: COUPE,AI架構,3D Integration,Memory Stacking,光子技術

news.Title: 〈台積技術論壇〉張曉強：AI驅動半導體產業提前破兆美元 點名COUPE接棒CoWoS
news.Content: 台積電 (2330-TW)(TSM-US) 今 (14) 日舉辦技術論壇，全球業務資深副總經理暨副共同營運長張曉強表示，AI 發展速度遠超過市場原先預期，預期今年全球半導體營收將遠超過 1 兆美元，較原先預期提前逾 4 年達陣，會中也提到 COU ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電預期今年全球半導體營收將超過1兆美元，較原先預期提前逾4年達成。
• AI發展速度遠超預期，已成為半導體產業成長的主要動能，並可能成為人類歷史上最具影響力的技術之一。

• AI與HPC將成為未來半導體市場最重要的應用，資料中心對半導體的需求已快速攀升。
• 台積電正積極與DRAM夥伴合作，透過3D IC技術，將DRAM直接堆疊到先進運算邏輯上，並預期COUPE將成為下一代關鍵先進封裝技術。

台股氣勢如虹，今年來已上漲逾四成，隨著台股大盤走高，台股ETF也持續發熱，目前掛牌的台股ETF來到88檔，總規模也創高 ...

news.Title: 3 Stocks That Could Benefit From the SpaceX IPO
news.Content: SpaceX is set to be the largest initial public offering (IPO) in history this summer. The company aims to raise $75 billion in capital at a valuation of $1.75 trillion. That's a lot of cash that could soon hit the company's balance sheet, giving it the opportunity to ramp up significant capital expenditures, benefiting multiple companies. Meanwhile, the IPO excitement has spread to other aerospace stocks, bolstering the entire sector. Several companies could come out as winners thanks to SpaceX's IPO. Here are ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's anticipated $75 billion IPO at a $1.75 trillion valuation could significantly benefit Alphabet (GOOGL) due to its substantial stake.
• Alphabet's ~5% stake in SpaceX could be worth approximately $87.5 billion post-IPO, offering potential for reinvestment in high-return opportunities like AI data centers.
• Intel (INTC) is positioned to benefit from the SpaceX IPO financing the Terafab joint venture with Tesla, utilizing Intel's 14A fabrication process.
• Linde (LIN) is a key industrial gas provider for rocket launches and has a close relationship with SpaceX, potentially benefiting from increased launch activity.
news.Keywords: IPO, Strategic Investment, Capital Expenditure, Semiconductor Manufacturing, Industrial Gases

news.Title: 〈台積技術論壇〉廣達：AI有四大面向升級 期待台積電IVR、SoW發展
news.Content: 廣達 (2382-TW) 副總經理趙茂贊今 (14) 日受邀至台積電 (2330-TW)(TSM-US) 技術論壇演講，並於會中表示，AI Scale-up 架構興起，帶動四大面向升級，包括 ASIC 數量、機櫃功耗、晶片 TDP 與 Fabric SerDes 速 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 廣達副總趙茂贊在台積電技術論壇指出，AI Scale-up 架構興起，帶動ASIC數量、機櫃功耗、晶片TDP與Fabric SerDes速度四大面向升級。
• 預計未來單一機櫃功耗可能提升至1MW等級，電源轉換效率與高壓電源架構（如800V DC）將成為關鍵。
• 隨著晶片TDP攀升，散熱挑戰嚴峻，需從機櫃到晶片裸晶進行多層級整合，理想狀態是熱阻僅剩一層。
• 高速互連方面，銅線面臨瓶頸，未來系統勢必導入更多光互連，並從機櫃內部設計延伸至跨機櫃、資料中心層級。
• 廣達期待台積電在IVR（整合電壓調節）及SoW（系統單晶片）領域提供解決方案，以支持AI持續高速成長。
news.Keywords: AI伺服器,系統架構,功耗,散熱,光互連

news.Content: 台積電 (2330-TW)(TSM-US) 今 (14) 日舉辦技術論壇，亞太業務處長萬睿洋表示，2025 年在亞太地區一共消耗 210 萬片 ...

news.Title: AI boom puts SK Hynix on cusp of $1 trillion market value
news.Content: By Heekyong Yang and Gregor Stuart Hunter SEOUL, May 14 (Reuters) - SK Hynix is on the verge of topping a $1 trillion market value, just weeks after Samsung Electronics crossed the milestone, as ‌strong demand for artificial intelligence places South Korea at the heart of Asia's AI boom. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SK Hynix is approaching a $1 trillion market value, driven by strong AI-related demand for memory and high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips.
• The company's shares have risen over 200% this year, following a 274% surge in 2025.
• South Korea is becoming central to Asia's AI boom, with SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics crossing the trillion-dollar market cap milestone.
• Taiwan's TSMC remains Asia's largest company by market value at over $1.83 trillion.
• Potential spillover demand for SK Hynix, Micron, and TSMC could arise from labor issues at Samsung, though a prolonged strike could impact the broader chip supply chain.
news.Keywords: market capitalization, AI demand, memory chips, HBM, semiconductor supply chain

news.Title: Which AI Supercycle Stock Will Make You Richer Over the Next 10 Years?
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle has produced no shortage of stock market winners. But two worth calling out are Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD) and Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) . Meanwhile, Intel is finally showing signs of life after years of stumbles -- and its stock has been on a tear as Wall Street bets that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) reported Q1 revenue growth of 38% year-over-year to $10.3 billion, with data center revenue up 57% to $5.8 billion.
• AMD has multi-year commitments worth tens of billions of dollars from clients like OpenAI and Meta Platforms.
• Intel reported Q1 revenue growth of 7% to $13.6 billion, with its data center and AI group growing 22%, but posted a $3.7 billion net loss.
• Intel's turnaround strategy hinges on its 18A manufacturing process and securing external foundry customers, while AMD shows stronger cash generation and customer commitments.

news.Title: Tesla Stock Is Soaring. Is the $10 Trillion Robotaxi Story Finally a Buy?
news.Content: Shares of electric vehicle and energy specialist Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) have come roaring back. After spending most of the year in the red, the stock has climbed about 26% over the past month, with shares trading at about $445 as of this writing. One catalyst for the stock recently has been Tesla's Robotaxi story. Bulls argue that Tesla's autonomous ride-sharing network -- which Ark Invest's Cathie Wood has speculated could eventually represent a $10 trillion global opportunity -- is finally gaining some significant traction. With unsupervised rides now happening in Texas and more cities on the way, there's good reason ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's stock has risen approximately 26% in the past month, driven partly by optimism around its Robotaxi service.
• Tesla's paid Robotaxi miles nearly doubled sequentially in Q1 2026, with expansion plans in multiple cities.
• Goldman Sachs estimates the global Robotaxi market could reach $415 billion by 2035.
• Tesla's market cap is around $1.7 trillion on trailing revenue of $98 billion and net income of $3.9 billion, with a Q1 operating margin of 4.2%.
• Capital expenditures for 2026 are expected to exceed $25 billion, potentially leading to negative free cash flow for the remainder of the year.

news.Title: Veteran analyst resets Apple stock price target for 2026
news.Content: Apple’s ( AAPL ) AI strategy has been quiet for a while, but things could change quickly. The move shows a broader view that Apple’s AI push may still be in its early stages, even if investors have not seen much of it reflected in the numbers yet. For perspective, the year has been mostly wonky for Apple stock, with it rising around 8% year-to-date according to Seeking Alpha . ...

news.Title: Cisco Systems Q3 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content: Key Points Interested in Cisco Systems, Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better. Cisco posted record fiscal Q3 results , with revenue up 12% year over year to $15.8 billion and non-GAAP EPS rising 10% to $1.06, both above the top end of guidance. Management said demand accelerated across hyperscale, enterprise, and public-sector customers. AI infrastructure orders were a major growth driver , with hyperscaler AI orders totaling $1.9 billion in the quarter and year-to-date orders reaching $5.3 billion. Cisco raised its fiscal 2026 AI infrastructure order outlook to about $9 billion and expects roughly $4 billion in related ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cisco reported record fiscal Q3 results with revenue up 12% year-over-year to $15.8 billion and non-GAAP EPS up 10% to $1.06.
• AI infrastructure orders were a major driver, with hyperscaler AI orders reaching $1.9 billion in Q3 and year-to-date orders at $5.3 billion.
• Cisco raised its fiscal 2026 AI infrastructure order outlook to $9 billion and expects roughly $4 billion in related revenue.

news.Title: Should You Buy the Cerebras IPO? Here's How the AI Chip Stock Stacks Up.
news.Content: Cerebras is expected to make its public debut on Thursday, and investors just can't wait. After its initial public offering (IPO) filing a couple of weeks ago, the offering is 20 times oversubscribed, leading the company to increase its target share price to between $150 and $160 and increase the number of shares offered. The high end of that range would value the company at roughly $48.8 billion. That might seem like small potatoes compared to competing AI semiconductor stocks like Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cerebras' IPO is highly anticipated, with the offering 20 times oversubscribed and the target share price increased.
• Cerebras designs wafer-scale chips that are significantly larger and more power-efficient than traditional GPUs for AI inference.
• OpenAI has committed $20 billion to rent capacity from Cerebras, and Amazon plans to use Cerebras chips in its data centers.
• Key risks include severe customer concentration with OpenAI and execution risk in building large-scale data centers.
• Manufacturing relies on TSMC's N5 process, posing supply chain risks due to high demand for leading-edge technology.
news.Keywords: AI chip IPO, wafer-scale chips, customer concentration, execution risk, supply chain

news.Title: Better Buy: Taiwan Semiconductor vs. Micron Stock
news.Content: In the chip manufacturing world, there are two primary types of chips made: memory and logic chips. Each serves a different purpose in a computer, and each is important. In the logic chip world, there is no bigger manufacturer than Taiwan Semiconductor (NYSE: TSM) . In the memory world, it's a bit more spread out, and Micron (NASDAQ: MU) is among the largest producers. However, many investors are ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM) is a logic chip manufacturer, while Micron (MU) is a major memory chip producer.
• Micron reported Q2 FY2026 revenue of $23.9 billion, a significant increase from $8.05 billion last year, driven by high memory chip demand and prices.
• Micron expects $33.5 billion in revenue next quarter and forecasts sustained growth due to the memory chip shortage.
• TSMC shows strong results with 40% revenue growth, but Micron's current explosive growth in a supply-constrained market offers higher upside potential despite its cyclical nature.
news.Keywords: Memory chips, Logic chips, Revenue growth, Supply shortage, Cyclicality

news.Title: GF Securities Reckons Qualcomm Will Be a Hit in the CPU Server Cycle. QCOM Stock Has a Rocky Road Ahead.
news.Content: Qualcomm (QCOM) stock climbed 8% after investment firm GF Securities predicted that a “server CPU super cycle” is on the anvil and that the chipmaker may be one of the key beneficiaries of this trend. While also making the case for the likes of Intel (INTC) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), GF Securities highlighted that, in a bullish scenario, "assuming Qualcomm captures 30% of ARM-based CPU market in 2028 […] the resulting [$3.6 billion] in net ...

• Qualcomm's potential capture of 30% of the ARM-based CPU market by 2028 could boost its annual non-GAAP earnings by approximately 30% ($3.6 billion).
• The company is developing its Oryon CPU core and server-grade processor (SD1) for data centers, aiming to integrate with Nvidia's GPU infrastructure for AI workloads.
• Qualcomm's acquisition of Alphawave Semi for $2.4 billion strengthens its position in high-speed chip-to-chip connectivity and custom silicon for cloud customers.

news.Title: 台積電龍科三期復活？台電：全力滿足電力需求、評估大潭新建10號機
news.Content:
外傳台積電龍科三期投資案「復活」，台電表示，對於高科技業所需電力會盡最大努力滿足；同時，針對台積電可能增加的需求，台電總經理郭天合表示，台電評估，可能由鄰近桃園大潭電廠的1到6號機延壽或改建，或是興建第10部機組的可能性。

經濟部能源署長吳志偉、台電新任總經理郭天合13日說明能源相關議題。郭天合表示，無論是AI資料中心用電需求，或是「護國神山」等半導體用電需求，在台電系統中都有所掌控；他強調，根據台電既定排程，至2030年的供電無虞。

外傳台積電將重啟龍科三期投資案，有關供電如何規劃，郭天合指出，鄰近的大潭電廠1號到6號機的壽命大約是30年，目前服役大約20年，因此台電正在評估是否要進行更新改建，或是延壽。另一方面，大潭電廠旁邊的空地還有可新建一部機組的空間，這部分台電也正在努力評估。郭天合強調，供電的計畫期程一定會和產業搭配。

台電發言人黃美蓮亦表示，針對國際大型資料中心這類高科技用電的需求，台電會盡全最大努力去滿足，包括龍科三期或是任何科學園區有需求，會來向台電協調。她強調，在這個過程中希望能和地方府密切合作，例如納入都市計畫規劃。

郭天合表示，台電未來新機組上線規劃，包括今年底之前，興達新2號機組、新3號機組，以及台中1、2號機組都會接受調度；吳志偉補充，之後大林新燃氣機組預計於2029年上線，通霄二期共五部機組則目標在2029到2031年陸續上線，另外，台中二期共四部機組則規劃於2032年、2033年上線。郭天合表示，前兩者已經發包，台中二期則在備標當中。

news.Title: Boxes, Subscriptions, and Beyond: The Evolution of Software Pricing
news.Content: Once upon a time, you bought software the way you bought a toaster. Walk into a store. Pick up a box. Hand over money. Take it home. Install the software and run it. The package was yours forever. This delivery method applied everywhere. Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) Windows came in a box, and so did the Office suite. Adobe (NASDAQ: ADBE) Photoshop came in a box. The box contained floppy disks, then CDs, then DVDs. Enterprise-class stuff like the Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) database may have come on a roll of magnetic tape ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article discusses the historical evolution of software pricing models, from one-time box purchases to subscription-based services (SaaS) and pay-as-you-go models.
• It highlights how companies like Microsoft, Adobe, and Salesforce transitioned to subscription models, leading to more predictable revenue and stock appreciation.
• The shift to SaaS and metered billing introduced new dynamics for both software providers and enterprise customers regarding revenue predictability and budgeting.
• The piece touches upon the rise of open-source software as a free alternative in parallel to commercial software pricing evolution.
news.Keywords: software pricing, subscription model, SaaS, metered billing, open-source

news.Title: 【獨家】台股創新高期貨商卻無貨可賣　業者憂將爆流動性風險
news.Content: 台股飆漲上4萬點，創歷史新高之際，國內證券商、 期貨 商卻相繼爆出隱憂，一名期貨商高層向本報透露，近來資本市場熱絡，期貨商卻很頭大，「台股只要再漲個1、2000點，期貨商隨時就面臨無貨可賣的窘境，現在已有期貨商停賣新倉；如果台股 ...

• 台股飆漲至4萬點創歷史新高，但期貨商面臨「無貨可賣」的窘境，恐有流動性風險。
• 由於台股漲勢過快，期貨商資本計提不足，已有12家期貨業者面臨資本計提難題，部分業者資本計提已低於30%或20%，可能面臨停止收單。
• 金管會已於2月得知此問題，並請期交所研議因應措施，但迄今無結論。
• 部分期貨商已開始勸客戶不要下單或不開新倉。
• 期貨公會呼籲修法，將期貨商資本計提比照國際標準8%，而非現行的15%。
news.Keywords: 期貨商,資本計提,流動性風險,流動性不足,法規監管

news.Title: China criticizes US chip equipment bill in run-up to Beijing talks
news.Content: By Karen Freifeld May 13 (Reuters) - China is pushing back against proposed U.S. legislation that would curb its chipmakers in the global AI race, making early moves that underscore Beijing's concerns. The proposal, known as the MATCH Act, is likely to be raised in discussions this week in Beijing alongside a long-awaited meeting between U.S. President ‌Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping. For months, the Trump administration has held back from imposing new regulations on technology exports to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• China is criticizing proposed U.S. legislation (MATCH Act) aimed at curbing its access to chipmaking equipment for AI semiconductors.
• The legislation is expected to be a topic of discussion during the upcoming Trump-Xi summit in Beijing.
• Chinese officials have publicly criticized the bill, prepared countermeasures, and summoned U.S. embassy diplomats.
• The U.S. aims to use export controls to maintain an advantage in the AI race, while China views the bill as undermining international trade order.
news.Keywords: geopolitics, semiconductor trade, export controls, AI race, trade legislation

news.Title: 1 Unstoppable Stock to Buy Before It Joins Nvidia, Alphabet, Apple, and Microsoft in the $3 Trillion Club
news.Content: There are currently 13 companies with market caps of $1 trillion or more, but only four are members of the elite $3 trillion club (as of this writing): Nvidia at $5.3 trillion, Alphabet at $4.6 trillion, Apple at $4.3 trillion, and Microsoft at $3 trillion. Aside from being the world's most valuable companies, these titans of industry have another thing in common: they are all customers of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE: TSM) ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC) is a critical supplier to major tech companies like Nvidia, Alphabet, Apple, and Microsoft, all of which are in the $3 trillion market cap club.
• TSMC holds a dominant 72% share of the global chip market and produces over 90% of the most advanced semiconductors, fueling the AI boom.
• In Q1, TSMC reported revenue of $35.9 billion, up 41% year-over-year, with gross margins at 66.2% and operating margins at 58.1%.
• Analysts forecast TSMC's revenue to reach $207.1 billion in 2026 and $253.3 billion in 2027, potentially supporting a $3 trillion market cap by 2028.
news.Keywords: semiconductor foundry, AI, market share, revenue growth, margin expansion

news.Content: By Laurie Chen, Trevor Hunnicutt and Heejin Kim BEIJING/SEOUL, May 13 (Reuters) - President Donald Trump said he would urge China's Xi Jinping to "open up" to U.S. business on his way to a summit in Beijing on Wednesday, adding Nvidia 's Jensen Huang to a group of CEOs travelling with him when he stopped in Alaska en route. What challenges does Trump ...
news.AI_Summary:
• President Trump is taking Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to China to urge 'openness' for U.S. businesses.
• Nvidia has faced regulatory hurdles in selling its H200 AI chips in China.
• The trip aims to secure economic wins and address trade issues, including potential U.S. arms sales to Taiwan.
• Trade negotiations are ongoing to maintain a fragile trade deal between the U.S. and China, with Beijing seeking eased curbs on chipmaking equipment and advanced semiconductors.

news.Content: Key Points Interested in NiSource, Inc? Here are five stocks we like better. The company still reaffirmed its 2026 adjusted EPS guidance of $2.02 to $2.07 . Data center deals are driving the outlook upgrade , including agreements with Alphabet and Amazon through NiSource’s GenCo model. news.Title: 1 Dividend ETF Quietly Outperforming the Market Right Now

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: The Market Looks Frothy: 3 Moves I'm Making In Response
news.Content: As the market indexes hover near all-time highs, investors appear optimistic, as stocks tied to areas such as artificial intelligence (AI) continue moving higher. Nonetheless, such moves may worry long-term investors. The Shiller price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio , which averages earnings over a 10-year period adjusted for inflation, is now at around 42. The only other time it reached that level was during the dot-com boom, and as many long-term investors know, that gave way to a dot-com bust. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" ...

news.Content:
4月以來台股漲勢凶猛，520更是絕佳助漲題材。建議以「五大信賴產業」為主，搭配政策重點著墨的產業，作為選股方向。特別是基期仍低者，有機會接棒上攻。

5月台股熱力不減，頻創歷史新高，在市場氣氛沸騰之際，代表總統就職周年、慶祝行情可 ...

• 儘管市場氣氛沸騰，但法人示警台股與年線正乖離率逼近50%、巴菲特指標超過450%，已達史上最熱、超漲警訊，預期第三季拉回機率高。

news.Title: CoreWeave CEO sends blunt message to Nvidia stock investors
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) stock investors have laughed all the way to the bank over the past three years, as the company has crushed the AI chip space. CoreWeave ( CRWV ) CEO Michael Intrator, however, just laid out why that incredible level of dominance requires consistent defense. In a recent CNBC interview , Intrator said Nvidia is “covering their bases” with its prescient AI infrastructure partnerships to ensure its customers have access to enough compute. Being on top of its game is imperative, though, because according to CompaniesMarketCap , Nvidia is now worth north of $5.30 trillion, and any ...
news.AI_Summary:
• CoreWeave CEO Michael Intrator highlights the need for Nvidia to defend its AI chip dominance through infrastructure partnerships.
• Nvidia's market cap has surged to over $5.3 trillion, driven by AI chip demand, but competitors like AMD are gaining traction.
• AMD reported strong Q1 revenue growth of 38% to $10.25 billion, with data center sales up 57% to $5.8 billion.
• Nvidia's strategy involves securing infrastructure and locking in clients, but high costs and scaling challenges could impact its stock performance.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, competitive landscape, market dominance, revenue growth, data center sales

news.Title: QuickLogic Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content: Key Points Interested in QuickLogic Corporation? Here are five stocks we like better. QuickLogic reported stronger Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue of $5.1 million, up 16.5% year over year, and said it remains on track for 50% to 100% full-year revenue growth with second-half profitability still expected. The company highlighted progress on RadPro radiation-hardened FPGA products and Intel 18A eFPGA contracts, including shipped development kits, a growing pipeline, and a potential multimillion-dollar commercial award expected in Q3. QuickLogic guided Q2 revenue to $6 million, plus or minus 10% , and expects non-GAAP profitability and positive cash flow in the second half ...
news.AI_Summary:
• QuickLogic reported Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue of $5.1 million, a 16.5% year-over-year increase, and anticipates 50% to 100% full-year revenue growth.
• The company expects second-half profitability and positive cash flow in 2026, driven by progress in RadPro radiation-hardened FPGA products and Intel 18A eFPGA contracts.
• Q2 revenue guidance is set at $6 million, with a potential multimillion-dollar commercial award expected in Q3.
• Non-GAAP gross margin was 39.6%, below guidance due to inventory reserves, and the company posted a non-GAAP net loss of $1.3 million.
news.Keywords: revenue growth, profitability, FPGA, eFPGA, Q1 earnings

news.AI_Summary:
• 受惠台股強勢反彈與成交量創新高，4月證券交易稅實徵淨額達546億元，年增2.1倍，創單月新高。

news.Title: 台股開殺700點！00403A大跌5％該跑嗎？達人幫畫「2重點」：00981A演過別糾結
news.Content: 美伊終戰添變數，加上費半回檔，台股今（13）日開盤跳水，指數一度急殺逾700點，摜破5日均線4萬1704點，連帶使昨（12）日才風光掛牌的千億級新秀主動統一升級50(00403A)重摔近半根停板，來到10.25元，跌幅超 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受美伊戰事變數及費半回檔影響，台股13日開盤跳水，指數一度急殺逾700點，摜破5日均線。
• 昨日掛牌的千億級主動型ETF 00403A重摔近5%，半小時爆量逾121萬張，蜜月行情變調。
• 理財達人分析，即使ETF溢價5%，但以00981A歷史經驗，長線仍能創造翻倍成長。
• 達人建議，若用閒錢投資，下跌反而是買進機會，高點終究只是未來的半山腰。
• 強調主動型ETF買的是頂尖經理人主動選股的超額報酬能力（Alpha），不應計較微小溢價。
news.Keywords: 台股, 主動型ETF, 溢價, 追高套牢, 閒錢投資

news.Title: Waymo recalls thousands of robotaxis for surprising reason
news.Content: On April 20, an unoccupied Waymo robotaxi encountered a flooded section of road in San Antonio during extreme weather. Instead of stopping, it slowed down and kept going. The vehicle was swept into Salado Creek. It had to be recovered from the waterway days later. Ten days after that incident, Waymo filed a voluntary recall. On May 12, the recall became public. And the reason behind it raises questions that go well beyond one vehicle on one flooded road in Texas. What the Waymo recall covers and why NHTSA is involved Alphabet-owned Waymo filed a voluntary recall with the National ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Waymo is recalling 3,791 robotaxis across approximately 10 U.S. cities due to an issue where vehicles slowed but did not stop when encountering flooded roads.
• The recall affects vehicles with fifth- and sixth-generation autonomous driving systems, highlighting challenges in handling unpredictable real-world conditions like severe weather.
• Waymo has implemented interim measures including new weather-related constraints and operational limits, with a full software remedy to be delivered over-the-air.
• The incident and recall raise questions about the limitations of autonomous driving technology in extreme weather and Waymo's expansion into areas with volatile weather patterns.
news.Keywords: autonomous driving, recall, severe weather, software update, operational limits

news.Title: Micron flashes investors rare technical signal
news.Content: Earlier on May 12, I wrote about SanDisk (SNDK) hitting 80 relative strength index, or RSI, one of the most extreme overbought readings in the stock market. The AI memory trade, I noted, was running at a pace that rarely ends quietly. Then Micron ( MU ) showed up with its own flashing signal too. RSI on Micron reached 85 on May 11, deep into overbought territory. Then May 12 brought the pullback . MU fell 6.84% in trading as of writing, retreating to an RSI of approximately 74, while the broader tech sector declined 2.63%. Even after the pullback, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron (MU) experienced a pullback, falling 6.84% after reaching an extremely overbought RSI of 85, while SanDisk (SNDK) also showed an overbought signal.
• Despite the pullback, Micron's stock is up 159.71% year-to-date and 704.76% over the past year, driven by strong demand for High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) for AI.
• The company reported record Q2 fiscal 2026 financial metrics, including $23.86 billion in revenue and $13.79 billion in GAAP net income.
• Micron guided for $33.5 billion in Q3 fiscal 2026 revenue and 81% gross margins, with its HBM production for 2026 and much of 2027 reportedly sold out.
news.Keywords: semiconductor, AI memory, HBM, RSI, revenue surge

news.Title: The Q1 Cloud Face-off Is Over -- There Was 1 Clear Winner
news.Content: After several years of deceleration, the advent of artificial intelligence (AI) has reignited cloud computing in a big way. The Big Three cloud infrastructure providers -- namely Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) , Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) , and Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) -- all reported accelerating growth. AI models require massive computing power for training and inference, making them an ideal fit for the cloud. The unprecedented demand for AI has these cloud rivals scrambling to expand capacity, with each reporting record levels of spending on capital expenditures (capex). Those investments are paying off, as each of the Big Three reported ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Big Three cloud providers (Amazon AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud) all reported accelerating growth in Q1, driven by AI demand.
• AWS revenue grew 28% to $37.6 billion, with AI revenue growing triple digits, and Amazon plans $200 billion in capex for 2026.
• Microsoft Azure cloud revenue grew 30% to $34.7 billion, with Azure posting 40% growth and AI revenue surpassing a $37 billion annual run rate.
• Google Cloud saw the fastest growth, surging 63% to $20 billion, with its cloud backlog nearly doubling to over $460 billion and AI solutions as its primary growth driver.
news.Keywords: cloud computing, AI, revenue acceleration, capex, market share

news.Title: Does Microsoft pay a dividend? Its yield and payout explained
news.Content: Looking for an investment that delivers both long-term growth and consistent income? Look no further than hybrid stocks like Microsoft ( MSFT ). Just like hybrid cars offer drivers a “win/win” combination of combustion power and EV technology, hybrid stocks offer investors the best of both worlds in terms of growth and income, sporting market-beating capital appreciation with the added stability of regular cash or stock distributions. Microsoft is one of the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft offers a dividend yield between 0.86% and 0.98%, with a quarterly dividend of $0.91 per share and an annual payout of $3.64.
• The company is considered a 'hybrid stock' due to its strong earnings growth, healthy cash flow, and consistent dividend payouts, alongside market-beating capital appreciation.
• Microsoft is on track to become a Dividend Aristocrat in 2028, having increased its dividend for 17 consecutive years.
• Its massive cash flow (reported at $46.7 billion in Q3 2026) and low payout ratio contribute to the safety and reliability of its dividend.
news.Keywords: dividend, hybrid stock, cash flow, dividend growth, payout ratio

news.Title: 4 Brilliant Chip Stocks to Capitalize on the Artificial Intelligence (AI) Build-Out
news.Content: While there may be questions surrounding the validity of companies spending hundreds of billions of dollars on artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure, the reality is, that money is being spent, a handful of companies are directly benefiting from it -- most prominent among them, chipmakers. With those hardware companies getting paid right now, these businesses have major upside, and I think most investors would benefit ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Chipmakers are directly benefiting from the significant investments in AI infrastructure, with fabricators and designers being key players.
• Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM) is the largest chip manufacturer, producing logic chips for AI designers, while Micron (MU) designs and produces memory chips.
• Micron is experiencing a massive memory chip shortage and high demand, allowing for price boosts, with analysts expecting 260% revenue growth next quarter.

news.Keywords: semiconductor, AI, chip fabrication, memory chips, GPUs, ASICs

news.Title: Amazon and Walmart’s fight for revenue beyond retail
news.Content: Amazon is officially moving beyond its identity as a retail giant to become the world’s most powerful logistics provider. Earlier this month, the company launched Amazon Supply Chain Services (ASCS) , a strategic pivot that brings more businesses to utilize Amazon’s infrastructure, even if they don’t sell on the Amazon marketplace. CEO Andy Jassy explicitly compared the launch to the early days of Amazon’s Web Services (AWS). “Similar to AWS, when Amazon extended its own internal cloud infrastructure services to enterprises, this gives other companies the benefit of Amazon’s experience and extensive network,” said Jassy . Amazon's ocean to door ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon is expanding beyond retail into logistics with the launch of Amazon Supply Chain Services (ASCS), offering its global shipping and distribution network to external businesses.
• ASCS aims to be the 'AWS of shipping,' leveraging Amazon's infrastructure, including over 100 aircraft, 80,000+ trailers, and 200 fulfillment centers with over 1 million robots.
• Major brands like Procter & Gamble and American Eagle are already using ASCS to manage freight, customs, and delivery.
• This move positions Amazon as a powerful logistics provider and directly competes with Walmart, which is also developing its post-retail infrastructure and services.
news.Keywords: logistics, supply chain, e-commerce, infrastructure, revenue diversification

news.Title: Arm Just Made a Bold Prediction, And It Could Be a Huge Buy Signal

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: Airbnb Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y, Shares Up
news.Content: Airbnb ABNB posted first-quarter 2026 diluted earnings of 26 cents per share, which missed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 15.23%. Earnings improved 8.3% from 24 cents in the year-ago quarter. Revenues were $2.68 billion, up 17.8% year over year and 15% on a forex-neutral basis. news.AI_Summary:
• Airbnb reported Q1 2026 diluted earnings per share of $0.26, missing estimates by 15.23%, though earnings grew 8.3% year-over-year.
• Revenues reached $2.68 billion, up 17.8% year-over-year and beating estimates by 2.16%, with Gross Booking Value at $29.2 billion and Nights and Seats Booked at 156.2 million.
• Nights and seats booked increased 9% year-over-year to 186.8 million, despite a 100-basis point headwind from elevated cancellations due to Middle East conflict.
• Total costs and expenses as a percentage of revenues decreased 150 basis points year-over-year to 96.8%, with Adjusted EBITDA up 24% to $519 million.
• Airbnb expects Q2 2026 revenues between $3.54-$3.60 billion (14-16% YoY growth) and raised its 2026 revenue growth outlook to the low-to-mid teens, targeting an adjusted EBITDA margin of at least 35%.

news.Title: MCHP Q4 Earnings Top Estimates, Broad-Based Demand Recovery Aids Sales
news.Content: Microchip MCHP delivered fourth-quarter fiscal 2026 non-GAAP earnings of 57 cents per share, which beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 14%. Net sales came in at $1.311 billion, rising 35.1% year over year and beating the consensus mark by 3.26%. The reported quarter’s results reflected broad-based improvement across end markets and stronger customer engagement, with the company ending the quarter with 185 days of inventory, down from the prior quarter. Microchip Sees Momentum Build Across End Markets Microchip management pointed to recovery across automotive, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microchip Technology reported Q4 fiscal 2026 non-GAAP earnings of $0.57 per share, exceeding estimates by 14%, and net sales of $1.311 billion, up 35.1% year-over-year and beating estimates by 3.26%.
• The company saw broad-based demand recovery across automotive, industrial, communication, data center, aerospace, and defense markets, with aerospace and defense being the strongest performer.
• Order activity strengthened significantly, with the book-to-bill ratio well above 1 in the March quarter and April being the largest booking month in nearly four years.
• Non-GAAP gross margin improved to 61.6% (from 52% YoY) and non-GAAP operating margin reached 30.6% (from 14% YoY), driven by cost efficiencies and improved utilization.
• Microchip generated $242.8 million in adjusted free cash flow, and management highlighted growing engagement in data center and AI applications, including PCIe Gen 6 switch and retimer offerings.

news.Title: What Are Wall Street Analysts' Target Price for Skyworks Solutions Stock?
news.Content: With a market cap of $9.8 billion, Skyworks Solutions, Inc. (SWKS) is a semiconductor company that develops and manufactures analog and mixed-signal semiconductor products for industries such as automotive, aerospace, smartphones, medical devices, and wireless communications. It serves customers ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) stock has declined 1.6% over the past 52 weeks, underperforming the S&P 500's 30.4% gain and the Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF's 59.2% surge.
• Despite reporting better-than-expected Q2 2026 adjusted EPS and revenue, shares fell 10.5% due to concerns about margin pressures and higher input costs.
• The company guided June-quarter gross margins to remain flat at 45% due to factors like expedite fees and commodity inflation.
• Cautious sentiment around smartphone demand and integration risks related to the planned Qorvo acquisition also impacted the stock.
• Analysts maintain a consensus 'Hold' rating, with a mean price target of $73.78, representing a 11.2% premium to current levels.
news.Keywords: stock performance, margin pressure, input costs, smartphone demand, analyst rating

news.Title: Here's How Much a $1000 Investment in Monolithic Power Made 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
news.Content: How much a stock's price changes over time is a significant driver for most investors. Not only can price performance impact your portfolio, but it can help you compare investment results across sectors and industries as well. Another thing that can drive investing is the fear of missing out, or FOMO. This particularly applies to tech giants and popular consumer-facing stocks. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• A $1000 investment in Monolithic Power (MPWR) made 10 years ago would be worth $25,211.33 as of May 8, 2026, representing a 2,421.13% gain.
• Monolithic Power reported total revenues of $804.2 million in Q1 2026, with key product families including DC to DC converters and lighting control ICs.
• End market revenue breakdown shows Enterprise Data (32.7%), Storage and Computing (21.7%), Automotive (18.9%), and Communications (13.9%) as significant contributors.
• Analysts forecast further upside for MPWR, citing strong Q1 2026 results and growth opportunities in automotive connectivity, ADAS, and LED lighting.
• The company is expanding into DDR5 and high-voltage power solutions, while also investing in industrial, server, and communications markets, despite facing semiconductor industry cyclicality.
news.Keywords: long-term investment, revenue growth, power solutions, automotive, semiconductor market

news.Content:

news.Keywords: 亞股,日股,韓股,ETF,記憶體

news.Title: QuickLogic AGM: Shareholders Back Directors, Pay Plan; CEO Touts eFPGA Wins and $89M Rad-Hard Push
news.Content: Key Points Interested in QuickLogic Corporation? Here are five stocks we like better. Shareholders overwhelmingly re-elected directors Brian C. Faith and Ron Shelton, approved the company's executive compensation on a non-binding basis, and ratified its auditor, with preliminary tallies showing more than 99% support for the directors and auditor and more than 98% for executive pay. CEO Brian Faith touted recent eFPGA commercial and defense wins — citing an Epson ASIC redesign that cut power consumption by about 50% after integrating QuickLogic’s eFPGA Hard IP and Idaho Scientific’s adoption for hardware-based cryptography — and said integration into ASICs/SoCs plus the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Shareholders overwhelmingly re-elected directors, approved executive compensation, and ratified the auditor at QuickLogic Corporation's 2026 Annual Meeting.
• CEO Brian Faith highlighted eFPGA commercial and defense wins, including an Epson ASIC redesign that reduced power consumption by 50% and Idaho Scientific's adoption for cryptography.
• The company forecasts 50-100% revenue growth with only a 15-20% increase in non-GAAP operating expenses, driven by eFPGA integration into ASICs/SoCs.
• QuickLogic is advancing radiation-hardened FPGA work, with a U.S. government prime contract expanded to a potential $89 million, targeting a market worth hundreds of millions.
• The company's discrete and embedded FPGA solutions aim to enhance hardware adaptability for algorithm updates, new interfaces, and changing mission requirements.
news.Keywords: shareholder meeting, eFPGA, radiation-hardened FPGA, revenue growth forecast, government contract
